text: Starting something that scares you takes a particular kind of courage, and you already have it, or you wouldn't be doing this at all. The fear you're feeling isn't a warning that you're making a mistake. It's just the natural weight of caring deeply about something that matters to you. That's a good sign, not a bad one. You've thought this through, you've weighed it honestly, and you decided to go anyway. That decision is the hard part, and it's already behind you. From here, you only have to take the next small step, then the one after that, and you don't have to see the whole road to walk it. Whatever happens, you'll learn, you'll adapt, and you'll be glad you tried rather than spending years wondering. I'm proud of you for betting on yourself, and I'm in your corner the whole way. Go get it.
